Appearances:
Plaintiff AP SF O'Farrell, LLC. is present.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jamal Gordon is present.

The settlement attorney Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. A Notice of Settlement is filed. The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
